articles.title: Behind the Supermarket, an Unlikely Bond Blossoms
articles.summary: An overworked salaryman and a mysterious cashier find connection over cigarettes in a new anime. "Smoking Behind the Supermarket With You" hits Crunchyroll this July — and it's more than just a rom-com.

articles.title: Final Fantasy XIV Fans Demand Butt Sliders — And Square Enix Says 'Not Yet'
articles.summary: At the Fan Festival in Anaheim, director Naoki Yoshida teased that butt sliders aren't coming to Final Fantasy XIV... yet. The crowd erupted, and fans are hopeful for the future.

articles.title: Katie Boulter and Venus Williams: An Unlikely Doubles Duo Triumphs in Madrid
articles.summary: Briton Katie Boulter partnered with seven-time Grand Slam champion Venus Williams at the Madrid Open. They won their first match together, and Williams praised Boulter's energy — even comparing it favorably to Serena's.
